creator: billblake2018@gmail.com
text:
geom_uzip(4) lists kernel "options zstd" as required.  There is no such option and no obvious replacement for it.  And geom_uzip seems to work fine anyway.  This page should also include "options ZSTDIO", which is required for using zstd compressed images but not for others.

mkuzip(8) mentions scripts at the start of the compressed images.  The scripts exist but don't work.  (I'll report that as a separate bug.)  The document also mentions that the scripts use mount_cd9660.  When the scripts are fixed, they'll just use a plain mount and the document should reflect that.
